title: THE SIX — DIRECTOR'S CUT V7
episodeObjective: Guide Maya from the damaged relay position to life-support and EVA storage. Keep the original story spine: six official crew names, seven biometric loads, an erased seventh EVA suit slot, and an UNKNOWN signal pointing toward the first voice before Hale.

e05_n01.speaker: MAYA
e05_n01.objective: Maya gets the relay pack on her back and starts moving instead of explaining the mission.

events.text: Which is rude of the universe, honestly.
Relay pack is blinking like it wants attention.
I'm putting it on my back.
That was a lie. I'm less fine.
But moving beats waiting for the station to invent new ways to be creepy.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: If I stop typing, I'm not ignoring you. I'm either using both hands or trying not to scream. Fun range.

events.notificationBody: Maya has the relay pack secured.

e05_r01_relay_ready.speaker: MAYA
e05_r01_relay_ready.objective: Maya starts toward the lower access spine and the first player choice sets her emotional stance.

events.text: It is heavier than it looks.
Which is impressive because it looks like a portable regret machine.
I'm in the lower access spine.
There are two emergency strips left. One is flickering. The other is trying its best.
Not because I enjoy breathing. Although, yes. Big fan.
Because if the crew records lied, life support might not.

e05_n02_memory_walk.speaker: MAYA
e05_n02_memory_walk.objective: Maya remembers the crew while walking, drifting like a real person under stress.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Hold on. Cable on the floor. I'm stepping over it. If I trip, you saw nothing.

events.text: He called himself Head of Not Dying.
I would like to hate it again.
Rivera fixed things by insulting them until they worked.
Park made jokes when he was scared. Owens laughed only when she thought nobody could hear.
On a station where nobody could print anything.
He found a way to make digital ink feel judgmental.
I went somewhere else for a second.

e05_n02_manifest_moving.speaker: MAYA
e05_n02_manifest_moving.objective: The official manifest is recovered while Maya continues moving.

events.title: CREW MANIFEST
events.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
events.caption: Recovered official ECHO crew manifest.

events.text: Very official. Very calm. Very suspicious.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Something just clicked behind the wall. Probably temperature shift. Probably. I am putting that word on trial later.

events.text: Hale's old control route is closer.
I know which one I'd pick if I wasn't trying to survive.

e05_n03_hale_control.speaker: MAYA
e05_n03_hale_control.objective: Maya talks about Hale with resentment, affection, and suspicion without dumping lore.

events.text: Basically anything that could kill you politely.
Bad men are easier when they are bad at their jobs.

e05_n03_route_choice.speaker: MAYA
e05_n03_route_choice.objective: The route choice creates danger/oxygen tradeoff.

events.text: Open is not the same as welcoming.
Faster gets me there before my courage notices.
Quieter means I spend more time listening to myself breathe.

e05_n04_main_corridor.speaker: MAYA
e05_n04_main_corridor.objective: Main corridor is faster but frightening.

events.text: Why not take the big haunted hallway.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Moving. Fast. Head down. Not looking into the rooms. Rooms can mind their business.

events.message: [MAYA IS MOVING THROUGH THE MAIN CORRIDOR]

e05_n04_maintenance_crawl.speaker: MAYA
e05_n04_maintenance_crawl.objective: Maintenance crawl is quieter but claustrophobic and reveals Grant's tag.

events.text: Tiny metal tunnel full of cables and regret.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: I'm in. Helmet scraped the ceiling. Dignity did not survive.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Cable touched my neck. I handled it with maturity and absolutely did not make a noise.

e05_r04_main_corridor.speaker: MAYA
e05_r04_main_corridor.objective: Main route result: Maya arrives faster but shaken.

events.text: Do not ask how fast I moved.

e05_r04_maintenance.speaker: MAYA
e05_r04_maintenance.objective: Maintenance route result: Maya arrives slower and finds Grant's tag.

events.text: If anyone asks, I was graceful.
Found something under the cable tray.

events.title: GRANT'S SECURITY TAG
events.content:
DAMAGED ID TAG
NAME: GRANT WALKER
ACCESS: SECURITY / LOWER SPINE
STATUS: OFFLINE
NOTE: Impact scoring along edge.
events.caption: Maya recovered Grant Walker's damaged security tag in the maintenance crawl.
events.message: [GRANT'S SECURITY TAG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: He would be very annoyed that I got sad in a vent.
So I'm choosing to be annoyed too.

e05_n05_life_support_hatch.speaker: MAYA
e05_n05_life_support_hatch.objective: Opening method creates irreversible physical or trust consequence.

events.text: Of course Hale made a backup for the backup.
Or scan first and pretend we are sensible people.

e05_n06_force_hatch.speaker: MAYA
e05_n06_force_hatch.objective: Force option hurts Maya and affects her tone.

events.text: I hate how decisive that sounded.
This is going to be loud.

e05_n06_scan_hatch.speaker: MAYA
e05_n06_scan_hatch.objective: Scan option rewards caution and strengthens bond.

events.text: Responsible adults in a nightmare tube.
Reader says the seam is hot near the latch.

e05_r06_force_return.speaker: MAYA
e05_r06_force_return.objective: Force consequence lands harder and changes Maya's attitude.

events.text: Pressure kicked the hatch back into my hand.
I can know that and still be mad.

e05_r06_scan_return.speaker: MAYA
e05_r06_scan_return.objective: Safe opening creates gratitude and cautious trust.

events.text: There was pressure trapped behind the seam.
If I'd forced it, my hand would've had a short but dramatic career.

e05_n07_life_support_core.speaker: MAYA
e05_n07_life_support_core.objective: Life support reveals seven active biometric loads through reaction, not exposition.

events.text: It is colder than the corridor.
How is a room colder than a dead hallway?
Please do not answer with physics.

events.title: LIFE SUPPORT ALLOCATION
events.content:
ECHO LIFE SUPPORT SNAPSHOT

Assigned crew capacity: 6
Active biometric loads before blackout: 7
Oxygen adjustment event: automatic
Unauthorized load marker: removed from index
events.caption: Recovered life support allocation record. Crew count mismatch detected.
events.message: [LIFE SUPPORT ALLOCATION ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Life support says seven bodies were breathing.
I need you to be very careful with what you ask me next.

choices.text: ASK IF SHE KNEW ABOUT SEVEN.

e05_n08_maya_confronted.speaker: MAYA
e05_n08_maya_confronted.objective: Confronting Maya creates a trust fracture but also reveals memory damage.

events.text: That landed exactly where it hurts.
And yes, I know how useful that answer is from the only living person in the room.
But now that you made me look at the gap...
Like a room in my head where the door was painted over.
I hate you a little for asking.

e05_n08_eva_route.speaker: MAYA
e05_n08_eva_route.objective: Maya chooses route to EVA storage after the seven-body reveal.

events.text: Close is a suspicious word now.
Suit prep means walking past the racks.
I know what's probably still hanging there.

e05_n09_suit_prep.speaker: MAYA
e05_n09_suit_prep.objective: Suit prep route is direct but emotionally punishing.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: I am not looking at the name tags.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: I looked at one name tag.

e05_n09_decon.speaker: MAYA
e05_n09_decon.objective: Decon route is slower but emotionally safer.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Decon lights still cycle. Blue. White. Blue. White. Like it thinks cleaning matters.

e05_r09_suit_prep.speaker: MAYA
e05_r09_suit_prep.objective: Suit prep return hits trauma hard.

events.text: Because apparently my survival strategy is emotional vandalism.

e05_r09_decon.speaker: MAYA
e05_r09_decon.objective: Decon return is calmer but costs oxygen.

events.text: The decon room smells like metal and old antiseptic.
I used to hate that smell.
Right now it means the room still remembers how to be a room.

e05_n10_eva_registry.speaker: MAYA
e05_n10_eva_registry.objective: EVA registry confirms an erased seventh slot.

events.text: But barely is today's version of generous.

events.title: EVA SUIT REGISTRY
events.content:
ECHO EVA SUIT REGISTRY

SUIT-01: ETHAN HALE
SUIT-02: MAYA CHEN
SUIT-03: GRANT WALKER
SUIT-04: RIVERA TORRES
SUIT-05: OWEN PARK
SUIT-06: SARAH OWENS
SUIT-07: ENTRY ERASED

Registry repair failed.
events.caption: Recovered EVA suit registry. Seventh suit slot exists but identity is erased.
events.message: [EVA SUIT REGISTRY ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Even I can hate that math.

events.title: MANIFEST_V2
events.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
07 █████████

Layer status: identity erased, not redacted.
events.caption: Recovered alternate manifest layer. Seventh entry erased.

events.text: Redacted means someone hid a name.
Erased means someone tried to kill the place where the name lived.

e05_n11_break.speaker: MAYA
e05_n11_break.objective: Unknown signal pushes Maya toward collapse; the player can support or accuse.

events.text: I don't know that I don't know it.

choices.text: ASK WHERE SHE SAW THE NAME.

e05_n12_accuse_maya.speaker: MAYA
e05_n12_accuse_maya.objective: Accusation creates a serious branch consequence before the finale.

events.text: The part where I become easier to blame than the dark.
A person can answer back. A missing name can't.
But if I die while you decide whether I'm guilty, I am haunting your interface.

e05_n12_first_voice.speaker: UNKNOWN
e05_n12_first_voice.objective: Cliffhanger points toward Episode 06: first contact / first voice before Hale.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: ETHAN HALE WAS NOT THE FIRST VOICE.

events.speaker: MAYA
events.text: Ask the archive what spoke before Hale.

events.speaker: MAYA
events.text: And if I go quiet after this...

choices.text: ASK MAYA ABOUT THE FIRST VOICE.

upgradeFocus: Existing story spine preserved: Life Support → Seven biometric loads → EVA registry → erased seventh identity → first voice before Hale.
Maya dialogue rewritten from exposition into Lifeline-style live survivor speech.
Lore reduced and converted into evidence files, short reactions, memory fragments, and emotional pauses.
CharacterBusy blocks shortened and redesigned so they support live-operation pacing rather than hiding the terminal.
Return nodes rewritten with physical consequences, emotional tone shifts, oxygen/stress tradeoffs, and player relationship impact.
Route choices create distinct consequences: main corridor increases danger and stress; maintenance reveals Grant's tag at oxygen cost.
Hatch choice creates irreversible consequence: forcing injures Maya and damages trust; scanning preserves her and strengthens trust.
Accusation branch creates severe trust fracture while keeping Episode 06 continuity intact.
Every choice group has exactly two choices.

summary: Character gets tired, distracted, angry, funny, and scared.
Player decisions affect Maya's body, trust, stress, danger, and episode 06 branch focus.
Dialogue feels like a real-time rescue operation instead of static lore delivery.
System messages are minimal and evidence-focused.
